name: mdfind
description: Finds files matching a given query

options.description: Prints an ASCII NUL character after each result path

options.name: -live
options.description: Provide live-updates to the number of files matching the query

options.name: -count
options.description: Output the total number of matches, instead of the path to the matching items

options.name: -onlyin
options.description: Limit the scope of the search to <dir>

options.name: -name
options.description: Search for matching file names to <filename> only

options.name: -s
options.description: Show contents of smart folder ~/Library/Saved Searches/<folder>.savedSearch

options.name: -literal
options.description: Force the provided query string to be taken as a literal query string, without interpretation

options.name: -interpret
options.description: Force the provided query string to be interpreted as if it had been typed into the Spotlight menu
